title: Day Trip to Point Pelee National Park
subtitle: A Stargazing Weekend Escape

stops.title: Departure from Toronto
stops.description: Your weekend begins in the heart of the city. Meet your fellow travellers at 34 Asquith Avenue, just north of the Yonge & Bloor subway station. We recommend arriving 15 minutes early. Board the Parkbus—an easy, car-free way to travel to Canada’s most remarkable natural spaces.

stops.title: The Journey South
stops.description: As Toronto fades behind you, enjoy the relaxed ride southwest through Ontario’s countryside. The journey to Point Pelee takes approximately 4.5–5 hours, with time to unwind, read, nap, or chat with fellow travellers who share your love of nature.

stops.title: Point Pelee National Park
stops.location: Point Pelee National Park, Leamington, ON
stops.description: By early afternoon, you’ll arrive at one of Canada’s most unique landscapes—where forest, marsh, and open lake converge at the southernmost point of mainland Canada. After disembarking, you’ll make your way to your accommodations.

stops.title: oTENTik Accommodations
stops.description: Check into your oTENTik—comfortable, park-based shelters that blend the feel of camping with the ease of a cabin stay. Once settled, the rest of the afternoon is yours to explore at your own pace.

stops.title: Marsh Boardwalk & The Tip
stops.description: Spend your afternoon walking the boardwalks through the marsh, exploring forest trails, and visiting the iconic tip of Point Pelee—the southernmost point of mainland Canada. Watch for migrating birds and butterflies as you wander through this ecological treasure.

stops.title: Stargazing with an Astronomer
stops.description: As night falls, the experience truly sets itself apart. Join Caroline El Khoury, a University of Toronto–trained astronomer, for a guided stargazing session. Under Point Pelee’s dark skies, Caroline will guide you through viewing the Perseids meteor shower, help you identify constellations and planets, and share tips for night sky photography.

stops.title: Morning in the Park
stops.description: Wake up surrounded by nature and enjoy a relaxed morning in the park. Take a final walk, enjoy the stillness, or revisit your favourite spots before preparing to depart.

stops.title: Return to Toronto
stops.description: In the afternoon, regroup and board the Parkbus for the return journey. As the sun lowers over Lake Erie, you’ll head back toward the city—tired, relaxed, and filled with memories of a night spent under the stars. Arrive back at 34 Asquith Avenue at approximately 7:30 PM.
